basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Mangalagiri Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for Doctor, Social Worker Posts
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Mangalagiri
basic_details.notification_number: AIIMS/MG/Anesthesiology/CSR Project for outreach Palliative care/ Recruitment/2026/06/e
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Mangalagiri (AIIMS Mangalagiri) Recruitment 2026: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Mangalagiri is conducting a Walk-in Interview for 2 Project Staff posts. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for eligible candidates to attend the interview directly without any prior online application.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.age_details: Max 40 years for Doctor, Max 35 years for Social Worker.
age_limit.details: Doctor: Maximum 40 years. Upper age limit may be relaxed as per Govt. of India rules. Social Worker: Maximum 35 years. Upper age limit may be relaxed as per Govt. of India rules.

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS Degree with registration under Medical Council of India for Doctor. MSW/BSW for Social Worker.
qualification.details: Doctor: MBBS Degree from the recognized University with registration under Medical Council of India. Experience in Palliative Care (Preferable). Social Worker: MSW/BSW.

selection_process: Interview Written tests may be conducted if the number of candidates applied is more.

all_official_links.label: Download AIIMS Mangalagiri Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the AIIMS Mangalagiri Project Staff recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process is through a walk-in interview. The interview is scheduled for 25 June 2026. Candidates must report with their documents on this date.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Project Staff at AIIMS Mangalagiri?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies for Project Staff, comprising one Doctor and one Social Worker position.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Doctor post?
faq.answer: For the Doctor post, candidates must possess an MBBS Degree from a recognized University with registration under the Medical Council of India. Experience in Palliative Care is preferable.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Social Worker position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Social Worker position is 35 years as of the date of the interview. The upper age limit may be relaxed as per Government of India rules.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Project Staff positions?
faq.answer: The Doctor position offers a salary of Rs. 75,000 per month, and the Social Worker position offers Rs. 25,000 per month. These are contract positions for 6 months, extendable.

faq.question: Q6. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The mode of application is a Walk-in Interview. Candidates need to appear directly at the venue on the specified date with all required documents.

faq.question: Q7. Where will the walk-in interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted at All India Institute of Medical Sciences Mangalagiri, Andhra Pradesh.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should candidates carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should carry their curriculum Vitae, original testimonials, and a set of photocopies of all documents.

faq.question: Q9. Are there any application fees for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q10. What is the selection process for the Project Staff posts?
faq.answer: The selection process primarily involves an interview. However, written tests may be conducted if the number of candidates applying is high.
